mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_logs (worker_id, started_at, planned_end_at) VALUES (#{workerId}, #{startedAt}, #{plannedEndAt})
mapper.select: SELECT work_log_id, worker_id, started_at AS startedAt, planned_end_at AS plannedEndAt, ended_at AS endedAt FROM work_logs WHERE worker_id = #{workerId} AND ended_at IS NULL ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_log_events (work_log_id, event_type, reason, occurred_at) VALUES (#{workLogId}, #{eventType}, #{reason}, #{occurredAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM work_log_events WHERE work_log_id = #{workLogId} ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT w.work_log_id AS workLogId, w.worker_id AS workerId, w.started_at AS startedAt,
-- [String 매핑] DTO의 plannedEndAt이 String이므로 DB에서 포맷팅하여 반환 DATE_FORMAT(w.planned_end_at, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AS plannedEndAt,
-- [식별] 이름 + 번호 뒷4자리 CONCAT(u.name, RIGHT(u.phone_number, 4)) AS workerName, u.assigned_zone_id AS zoneId,
-- [위치] 현재 수행 중인 작업(IN_PROGRESS)의 지번 및 라인 loc.line_id AS lineId, loc.location_code AS locationCode,
-- [상태] WorkLogEventType (Enum) 매핑 -- 최신 이벤트가 없으면 'START'로 기본값 설정 IFNULL( (SELECT event_type FROM work_log_events we WHERE we.work_log_id = w.work_log_id ORDER BY we.occurred_at DESC LIMIT 1), 'START' ) AS currentStatus,
-- [상태변경시간] LocalDateTime 매핑 IFNULL( (SELECT occurred_at FROM work_log_events we WHERE we.work_log_id = w.work_log_id ORDER BY we.occurred_at DESC LIMIT 1), w.started_at ) AS lastStatusChangedAt
FROM work_logs w JOIN users u ON w.worker_id = u.user_id
-- 현재 진행 중인 작업 조인 (위치 파악용) LEFT JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.worker_id = w.worker_id AND bt.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LEFT JOIN zone_locations loc ON bt.current_location_id = loc.location_id
WHERE w.ended_at IS NULL -- 퇴근하지 않은 사람만 조회
AND w.worker_id = #{workerId}
ORDER BY w.started_at DESC

SELECT w.work_log_id AS workLogId, w.worker_id AS workerId, w.started_at AS startedAt, w.ended_at AS endedAt, DATE_FORMAT(w.planned_end_at, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AS plannedEndAt,
CONCAT(u.name, RIGHT(u.phone_number, 4)) AS workerName, u.assigned_zone_id AS zoneId,
-- 이력 조회 시 상태는 완료(END)가 대부분 CASE WHEN w.ended_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'END' ELSE 'START' END AS currentStatus
FROM work_logs w JOIN users u ON w.worker_id = u.user_id
WHERE 1=1
AND w.worker_id = #{workerId}
ORDER BY w.started_at DESC
